Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Storm Sage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — The Storm Sage is a powerful figure.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Storm Sage is a source of lightning madra scales.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Storm Sage is one of the cult leaders who arrived.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Storm Sage destroyed Ziel's people and tortured him.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Storm Sage is fighting in a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Storm Sage rides on the back of a Forged lightning dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — The Storm Sage's regeneration was slow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — The Storm Sage caught Ziel's hammer with lightning-crackling hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin devoured power from the Storm Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Storm Sage was skilled in spatial transfer when he was alive.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
